value_summary: 仅报告 900 °C 生长条件，不能据此建立温度窗口或作者最优温度。
original_text: reaction temperature (900°C)
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Section 2.2
why_valuable: 避免把单一生长温度误解为适用温区或最优条件。

value_summary: Table 1 的 purity/carbon yield 来自 TGA 碳含量，不等同于应用级纯化产品纯度。
original_text: Carbon % yield @TGA
evidence_location: PDF p. 4, Table 1; PDF p. 8, Fig. 8 discussion
why_valuable: 防止把不同定义的纯度或碳含量指标直接比较。

value_summary: CNT 长度和残留金属未单独定量。
evidence_location: PDF pp. 6-8, Section 3.3 and characterization discussion
why_valuable: 这两项缺口会限制形貌比较、纯化负担判断和下游适用性评估。

value_summary: 压力、甲烷转化率、碳效率、催化剂寿命和连续运行时间未报告。
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Section 2.2; PDF pp. 8-9, discussion and conclusions
why_valuable: 这些缺失项直接限制物料效率、催化剂稳定性和连续化可行性判断。

value_summary: 作者使用 large-scale 表述，但实际实验催化剂装填量为 0.1 g，不能据此确认工业规模。
original_text: large-scale reactor (reactor i.d. ~100 mm)
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Section 2.2; PDF p. 8, Section 3.3
why_valuable: 保留作者放大表述，同时防止大直径实验管被误判为工业产能证据。

value_summary: The comparison changes catalyst precursor decomposition atmosphere, not CNT growth temperature. Only 900 °C growth was reported, so no growth-temperature window or temperature effect can be assigned.
original_text: reaction temperature (900°C)
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Sections 2.1-2.2
why_valuable: Prevents the three catalyst-preparation conditions from being misread as a CNT growth-temperature study.

value_summary: Ar and H2 decomposition produced better-dispersed 3-6 nm Fe-Mo clusters than air decomposition; the paper links this preparation difference with higher yield and more homogeneous t-MWCNT products.
original_text: The size of the dark spots was measured and found to be in the range of 3-6 nm
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-5 and 8; Table 1; Figs. 2-4; Conclusions
why_valuable: Provides a directly testable catalyst-preparation variable without adding a new main-table field.

value_summary: Air-decomposed SG-1 showed phase separation, particle agglomeration, low BET area, 73% weight-gain yield, 43% TGA carbon, and a mixed t-MWCNT/MWCNT/carbon-fiber product.
original_text: non-uniform distribution of catalyst particles
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-8; Table 1; Figs. 1-3 and 6-9
why_valuable: Preserves a negative comparison that can guide catalyst-preparation screening.

value_summary: The authors propose that high Mo content shields Fe nanoparticles against agglomeration and promotes methane aromatization; the paper does not provide a lower-Mo run series that isolates the effect.
original_text: Mo provides a shielding effect for the Fe nanoparticles
evidence_location: PDF pp. 5, 7-8; Sections 3.2-3.3; Conclusions
why_valuable: Captures the proposed role of Mo while clearly retaining its hypothesis status.

value_summary: The source describes sol-gel preparation as suitable for kilogram-level scale-up and uses large-scale wording for a reactor of about 100 mm inner diameter, while each reported CNT run loads only 0.1 g catalyst.
original_text: suitable for scale-up to the kilogram level
evidence_location: PDF pp. 2 and 8; Introduction; Sections 2.2 and 3.3
why_valuable: Retains the scale-up claim together with the experimental-load caveat for later industrial review.

value_summary: The process uses CH4/H2 at 900 °C; SG-3 catalyst preparation additionally uses H2 at 700 °C. The paper gives the gas program but no process-safety assessment.
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Sections 2.1-2.2
why_valuable: Flags high-temperature flammable-gas handling for later scale-up review without assigning an unsupported risk score.

value_summary: The reported 43%, 85% and 82% values are TGA carbon contents of as-synthesized products, not purified application-grade CNT purity or separately measured residual-metal content.
original_text: Carbon % yield @TGA
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4 and 8; Table 1; Fig. 8
why_valuable: Prevents incompatible purity metrics from being compared as equivalent values.

value_summary: The authors associate the high-Mo Fe:Mo ratio of 1:1.5 with increased carbon yield and more uniform t-MWCNTs, but this paper does not present a controlled lower-Mo composition series.
original_text: the higher Mo content for the Fe-Mo/MgO catalyst induced a higher product yield
evidence_location: PDF pp. 7-8; Section 3.3; Conclusions
why_valuable: Preserves a catalyst-composition hypothesis suitable for future controlled experiments.

value_summary: TEM-EDS spot atomic ratios differ from the nominal bulk Fe:Mo ratio; they are localized particle measurements and were not promoted to bulk composition fields.
evidence_location: PDF p. 5, Fig. 3 discussion
why_valuable: Retains potentially useful particle-level chemistry without mislabeling it as bulk catalyst composition.

value_summary: XPS binding-energy shifts and Mo oxidation-state assignments provide mechanistic context for atmosphere-dependent Fe-Mo interaction, but are not expanded into new v0.1 main-table fields.
original_text: Mo has a strong interaction with Fe
evidence_location: PDF pp. 5-6, Figs. 4-5
why_valuable: Preserves mechanistic characterization for later cross-source comparison while keeping the main schema stable.

value_summary: 催化剂焙烧时间存在正文与图示冲突：Experimental 正文写 500 °C 3 h，Figure 1 流程图写 500 °C 5 h。正式字段保留冲突，不选择性覆盖。
original_text: calcination at 500 °C for 3 h
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, Catalyst preparation; PDF p. 3, Fig. 1
why_valuable: 焙烧时间会影响 Fe-Mo 相态与颗粒尺寸，复现实验前必须人工核对。

value_summary: 升温程序存在内部不一致：正文报告 10 °C/min 从室温升至目标温度，而 Table 2 标题写 30-900 °C 共 40 min；两者不能同时成立。
original_text: linearly increasing at a rate of 10 °C min−1
evidence_location: PDF p. 2, CNTs synthesis; PDF p. 4, Table 2
why_valuable: 预还原停留和升温历程决定催化剂相变，不能把冲突值当作确定程序。

value_summary: 相同 nR-wH2 / CH4:H2=1:2 条件的 carbon yield 在 Table 3 为 10.85%，在 Table 4 为 15.85%；g-CNT/g-catalyst 均为 1.37。
evidence_location: PDF p. 7, Table 3; PDF p. 11, Table 4
why_valuable: 冲突影响跨条件产率排序；正式记录不应静默选择一个值。

value_summary: Table 4 中 CH4:H2=2:1 与 1:1 均报告 17.06% yield，但 product weight 和 g-CNT/g-catalyst 分别不同；按原表保留并标记待复核。
evidence_location: PDF p. 11, Table 4
why_valuable: 提示表格可能存在转录或定义问题，避免将相同百分比视为独立验证。

value_summary: Table 3 的 %C (TGA) 是 as-prepared product 的碳含量；残余为催化剂和载体，不能当作纯化后 MWCNT 产品纯度。
original_text: therefore we can get carbon content from TGA
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-5, TGA discussion; PDF p. 7, Table 3
why_valuable: 避免把总碳含量与 MWCNT 选择性、残留金属或应用级纯度混为一谈。

value_summary: 作者将产物称为 MWCNT，但正文未给出逐组壁数结果；Figure 6 标出 RBM，直径分布又包含 <5 nm 管，同时产物含无定形碳，因此不能把类型字段标成无杂质的 clean MWCNT success。
original_text: Dense CNTs were found in all SEM images included with some amorphous carbon
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-7, morphology discussion and Fig. 6
why_valuable: 保留 MWCNT 主体判断，同时明确 SWCNT/DWCNT 未被排除且产品为混合固体。

value_summary: H2 预还原使氧化态催化剂转为金属 FeMo，相比未还原条件使 g-CNT/g-catalyst 从约 1 提高到约 5，但平均直径增大且 IG/ID 降低；未还原路线形成 Mo2C/Fe3C 并得到更细、结晶度更高但产率更低的产物。
original_text: the reduction of catalyst process changes the catalyst structure from the oxide form to metallic structure
evidence_location: PDF pp. 6-9, Figs. 7-10 and discussion
why_valuable: 提供可直接用于催化剂活化设计的相态-产率-直径权衡。

value_summary: 在未预还原系列中，H2 共进料存在最佳点：CH4:H2=1:1 的 g-CNT/g-catalyst 最高为 1.47；继续增加 H2 会抑制甲烷分解并降低产率。
original_text: with an optimum point of 1:1
evidence_location: PDF pp. 9-11, Figs. 11-12 and Table 4
why_valuable: 为甲烷/H2 配比实验提供明确但仅限该催化剂和非预还原路线的候选窗口。

value_summary: 所有条件的 CNT 直径分布都很宽，作者描述从小于 5 nm 到大于 100 nm，标准差约 20-28 nm；均值变化不足以证明 H2 能稳定控制直径。
original_text: ranging from tiny CNTs (smaller than 5 nm) to huge CNTs (larger than 100 nm)
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-6 and 9-11, Figs. 5 and 12; Tables 3-4
why_valuable: 说明催化剂颗粒制备和产品均一性仍是主要工艺风险。

value_summary: 甲烷转化率随时间下降，作者归因于 CNT 覆盖活性表面；延长至 300 min 的对比显示 H2 共进料未保持催化剂稳定性，反而扩大产品质量差。
original_text: Methane conversions decreased over time because of catalyst deactivation
evidence_location: PDF pp. 4-5, Fig. 3; PDF p. 10, Figure S2 discussion
why_valuable: 直接指出连续运行和寿命优化不能仅依赖 H2 共进料。

value_summary: 900 °C 的后续氢化测试消耗约 3% CNT，并生成 CH4 和 CO；反应对结晶碳和无定形碳不具选择性，TGA 和 IG/ID 也未显示质量改善。
original_text: approximately 3% of CNTs were consumed
evidence_location: PDF pp. 10-13, Figs. 13-14 and Table 5
why_valuable: 提示 H2 可能造成产品损失，不能假设其会选择性清除无定形碳。

value_summary: R-woH2 动力学系列显示 CNT 形成速率从 850 到 950 °C 上升，1000 °C 因活性相团聚而下降；作者给出 Ea=13.22 kJ/mol，并判断可能受传质限制，因此不应作为本征动力学参数直接放大。
original_text: higher than 950 °C because of catalyst begin to be agglomerated
evidence_location: PDF pp. 13-15, Fig. 15 and kinetic discussion
why_valuable: 提供温度上限、团聚风险和动力学解释的放大边界。

value_summary: 作者比较 pseudo-first-order、单活性位模型和双活性位模型；两种吸附模型 R2 均为 0.998，但逐个动力学实验的精确条件和速率位于未附带的 Table S1，因此本轮不生成曲线读数 run。
original_text: The experimental data for kinetic study was shown in Table S1
evidence_location: PDF pp. 13-14, Eqs. 7-9, Fig. 15 and Table 6
why_valuable: 保留模型和缺失数据位置，便于取得 supporting information 后补充正式 run。

value_summary: 实验为 0.5 g 催化剂的石英管批次，未报告反应器尺寸、压力、连续运行、催化剂寿命、批间稳定性或单位 CNT 能耗/气耗；900 °C 下使用 CH4/H2 并直接 vent，安全环保评价缺失。
original_text: 0.5 g of FeMo/MgO catalyst was put in a quartz boat
evidence_location: PDF pp. 2-4, CNTs synthesis and Fig. 2; PDF p. 15, Conclusion
why_valuable: 防止把动力学研究的 scale-up 动机误判为已经验证的放大能力。
